changes_made: MemoCard.tsx: Relocated orphaned JSDoc comment for handleCopy that was incorrectly positioned above handleInsert after Issue #485 insertion
refactorings_applied: JSDoc comment placement correction in MemoCard.tsx

review_summary.SOLID: All Issue #485 additions follow single responsibility. onInsertToMessage callback is cleanly threaded through the component tree (WorktreeDetailRefactored -> HistoryPane/NotesAndLogsPane -> ConversationPairCard/MemoCard). MessageInput handles pendingInsertText via a dedicated useEffect.
review_summary.DRY: ConversationPairCard and MemoCard each have their own insert button implementation, but this is appropriate since their UI context differs (absolute positioned overlay button vs inline header button). No unnecessary duplication found.
review_summary.type_safety: All new props (pendingInsertText, onInsertConsumed, onInsertToMessage) are correctly typed as optional with ?. No any types introduced.
review_summary.no_debug_code: No console.log or debug statements found in Issue #485 changes.
review_summary.test_quality: Tests cover: insertion into empty message, appending to existing message, null pendingInsertText no-op, insert button rendering with/without callback, click handler invocation, and orphan pair edge case. Coverage is adequate.

message: Refactoring complete. One JSDoc comment placement issue fixed in MemoCard.tsx. All quality checks pass.
